items.name: Mini_vector_db
items.description: A high-performance, thread-safe, local vector database built from scratch. Mini Vector DB features a blazing-fast C++ core paired with an easy-to-use Python API via pybind11. It natively supports Brute Force, Inverted File (IVF), and Hierarchical Navigable Small World (HNSW) indices for scalable similarity search.
